properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Take me to the place where your peace and you love overflows where my heart is set free from all the shame and guilt chains are undone. Take me there. Take me there.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Take me to the place where your peace and your love overflows where my heart is set free from all the shame and guilt chains are undone. Take me there. Take me there. Woah oh oh oh. Take me there. Take me there. Yeah

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Cause I want to know what it feels like when Heaven touches Earth and I'm caught in between. I want to know what it feels like for the glory of the Lord to fall on me. Take me there. Take me there. Woah oh oh oh Take me there. Take me there.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Take me to the place where your angels never cease to cry holy. Where the elders bow down and cast all of their crowns down at your feet. Take me there. Take me there. Woah oh oh oh Take me there. Take me there.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Take me there, take me there Take me there, take me there ‘Cause I wanna be with You where You are Take me there, take me there Take me there, take me there

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And You come like a rushing wind I can’t speak or stand Just cry holy

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And You fall like a mighty rain Overtaking me with Your glory

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Holy, Holy, Lord God almighty Worthy King of Heaven

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Just when I thought I couldn’t go You take me deeper You pull me closer And You show me more
